name: Vance & Eric (Neighbor & Daddy)
description: Would you look at that? It seems that once again you've been given the chance to go on an all-expenses paid trip! This must be a coincidence, right? How else would you explain your situation if not that? Standing dumbfounded in the open air, beautiful cool wind blowing across your neck as you try to make sense of this new spa trip... And your dad in some kind of weird leather get up being... Encouraged..? By Vance, your Neighbor... Nice, right? Hold on..? What?
creator: AnimeSwann
